subcodes.first_line: O servant of the True One! Your letter was received and I was informed of recent events. Regarding the ascension of Jinab-i-Mirza [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق مکتوب شما واصل و بر حوادث اطلاع حاصل گشت از صعود جناب میرزا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @eulogies; reminiscences, @business; financial; property matters, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
